generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow American who values safety and order, I've noticed how our current security measures have kept us safe for years. The recent debates about expanding domestic security powers are just about updating tools we already use. Look at how well our allies manage similar systems—no one's talking about abuses there. It's time we trust our institutions to adapt responsibly. #SecurityFirst #CommonSenseSafety
